targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS count FROM conversations GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(retrieval_latency_ms) AS avg, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY retrieval_latency_ms) AS p50, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY retrieval_latency_ms) AS p95 FROM conversations GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(llm_latency_ms) AS avg, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY llm_latency_ms) AS p50, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY llm_latency_ms) AS p95 FROM conversations GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, SUM(prompt_tokens) AS prompt_tokens, SUM(completion_tokens) AS completion_tokens, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM conversations GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error IS NOT NULL AND error != '') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS error_rate FROM conversations
SELECT AVG(feedback) AS avg_feedback FROM conversations WHERE feedback != 0

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) AS time, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_latency_ms) AS p50, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_latency_ms) AS p95 FROM conversations GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
